Wendelstein 7-X · five field periods

Plasma boundary, colored by |B|

The last closed flux surface of a VMEC++ W7-X equilibrium; |B| on the boundary runs …. Around it, the 70 coils: 50 non-planar (steel blue), 20 planar (orange).
